MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
James Molinelli, esq.(925-446-3117) of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan for moving party via Court Call.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Mr. Molinelli reponds to the court's inquiries of contacting and serving the client. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Larisa K. Raymundo, esq. of Gilsleder, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan's Motion to be relieved as counsel.

Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed in open court.
